name: Instagram Profile
description: Instagram profile information including bio, follower counts, business details, viewer relationship state, and account flags.

full_name.description: Display name shown on the profile

biography_with_entities.description: Bio rendered with hashtag/mention entity offsets, when present

pronouns.description: Pronouns selected on the profile (array of strings)

bio_links.description: Structured bio links list (icon, title, lynx_url)

external_url_linkshimmed.description: Linkshim-wrapped external URL used by Instagram

fb_profile_biolink.description: Linked Facebook profile biolink, if connected

pk.description: Instagram primary key (numeric user id, as string)

fbid.description: Linked Facebook account id, when present

follower_count.description: Number of accounts following this user

following_count.description: Number of accounts this user follows

media_count.description: Number of posts on the profile timeline

is_private.description: True if the account is set to private

is_verified.description: True if the account has the verified badge

is_verified_by_mv4b.description: True if verified through Meta Verified for Business

is_business.description: True if the account is a business account (top-level shortcut)

is_professional_account.description: True if the account is a creator or business (professional)

is_supervised_user.description: True if this account is being supervised by a parent

is_supervision_enabled.description: True if supervision tools are enabled on the account

is_joined_recently.description: True if the account was created recently

is_embeds_disabled.description: True if media embedding has been disabled

is_regulated_c18.description: True if the account is age-gated under c18 rules

hide_like_and_view_counts.description: True if like and view counts are hidden on the profile

has_clips.description: True if the account has posted Reels (clips)

has_channel.description: True if the account hosts an IGTV/broadcast channel

has_guides.description: True if the account has published guides

has_ar_effects.description: True if the account has published AR effects

has_chaining.description: True if profile chaining recommendations are enabled

country_block.description: True if blocked in the viewer's country

should_show_category.description: True if the business/creator category should be displayed

should_show_public_contacts.description: True if public business contact details should be displayed

show_account_transparency_details.description: True if account transparency information should be shown

business.description: Business and creator profile metadata grouped together

is_business_account.description: True if this is a registered business account

business_address_json.description: Business address serialised as a JSON string

viewer_relationship.description: Relationship state between the logged-in viewer and this profile

followed_by_viewer.description: True if the viewer follows this account

follows_viewer.description: True if this account follows the viewer back

requested_by_viewer.description: True if the viewer has sent a follow request

has_requested_viewer.description: True if this account has sent a follow request to the viewer

blocked_by_viewer.description: True if the viewer has blocked this account

has_blocked_viewer.description: True if this account has blocked the viewer

restricted_by_viewer.description: True if the viewer has restricted this account

is_guardian_of_viewer.description: True if this account is a guardian of the viewer

is_supervised_by_viewer.description: True if this account is supervised by the viewer

mutual_followed_by_count.description: Number of mutual followers between viewer and this account

collected_at.description: When this profile snapshot was captured (ISO 8601)
